heroHeadline: El Mayo Sentencing 12 Days Away; Government Response to Defense Memo Due April 6 — 616 Days of Cartel Civil War
heroSubtitle: 616 days of intra-cartel war since Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada's alleged kidnapping — 2,400+ homicides, 9,000+ families displaced. La Mayiza controls approximately 90% of former Chapitos territory. El Mayo's defense sentencing memorandum was submitted March 30; the government's response is due April 6, with sentencing before Judge Brian Cogan on April 13, 2026 carrying a mandatory life sentence and $15 billion forfeiture. Semana Santa security operations active across Sinaloa's municipalities. Chapitos security chief 'El Chuta' indicted in Chicago on narcoterrorism charges built on cooperation from Ovidio and Joaquín Guzmán López.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae
